mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: This application is a sadaqah jariyah — an ongoing act of charity. It is free forever, contains no advertising, collects no data, and will never be monetized.

authenticity.title: Text authenticity
authenticity.body: The Quranic text comes from Tanzil (Uthmani edition), a globally recognized reference source aligned with the Mushaf of Medina. The typeface is KFGQPC V20, used by the King Fahd Complex for printing the official Mushaf.

translations.title: Translations
translations.body: The French (Muhammad Hamidullah, 1959) and English (Sahih International, 1997) translations are established references, freely accessible.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.body: The source code is entirely free, under AGPL-3.0 license. Anyone can fork it, audit it, improve it.

quote.translation: And whoever saves one life — it is as if he had saved all of humanity.
